description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine Docker image and runs a before_script to install git, zip, and coreutils via apk. Define a single stage called build and a compile job in that stage. The compile job changes to the project directory, creates a ../artifacts/forematerial directory, moves all files there, zips the directory into forematerial.zip, renames it to forematerial.osk, and declares forematerial.osk as a build artifact. No caches, services, or conditional rules are needed.
